queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Statistical impact of loan purpose for used car purchase on mitigating credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers associated with present employment duration of less than one year and increased default likelihood.
